title: Create a domain library with enforced tags
description: Scaffolds a library under libs/<domain>/<name>, delegates to the correct framework library generator, and applies type:<type> + scope:<domain> tags automatically so the module-boundary rules can never be violated by a forgotten tag.

domain.description: Business domain / scope (e.g. shop, admin, shared).
domain.x-prompt: Which domain (scope) does this library belong to?

name.description: Library name within the domain (e.g. feature-cart).

framework.description: Framework library generator to delegate to.
